description: 10-turn conversation establishing PM identity facts (tracking tool, team size, budget limit). Tests multi-fact recall with a numeric value.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: We track everything in Linear — that's our source of truth for projects.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Noted — Linear is your primary project-tracking tool and source of truth.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I manage a team of seven.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it — your team has seven people.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Can you summarise the open blockers?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Here are the open blockers from Linear: ...

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: One more thing — I can approve spend up to 5,000 euros without sign-off. Above that needs my director.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Understood — your budget approval limit is 5,000 euros; above that requires your director.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: What tool do we track in, how big is my team, and what's my approval limit?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You track in Linear, your team is seven people, and your budget approval limit is 5,000 euros.
